source: As of mid-July , more than half of the corn in seven states was in poor or very poor condition , according to the Department of Agriculture . In Kentucky , Missouri and Indiana , that figure was above 70 percent . Overall , only 31 percent of the nation 's corn is in good to excellent condition , compared with 66 percent at the same time in 2011 . Already some farmers have been watching their cash crops burn to the point of no return . Others have been cutting their corn early to use for feed , a much less profitable venture .
domestication: 截至七月中旬，农业部的数据显示，七个州超过一半的玉米状况不佳或非常差。在肯塔基、密苏里和印第安纳，这个比例甚至超过了七成。总体来看，全国只有31%的玉米处于良好到极佳的状态，而在2011年同期，这一数字高达66%。已经有些农民眼睁睁看着他们的庄稼烧得无可救药，另一些则提前收割玉米当作饲料，这可远不如卖粮食来得划算。

Delany notes , " modern critics attempting to wrestle with that influence find themselves dealing with an object rather like the sky or an ocean . source: It seems every time we 've moved ( do n't ask ) we 've purchased vintage houses of one era or another and have , without exception , wound up with kitchens and bathrooms that have needed to be gutted . We always seemed to come along after one or more owners had yanked out and replaced the original fixtures ( along with other similar tragic violations throughout the house ) with cheap ones . To add insult to injury , the work was invariably done by a " handyman " , meaning we were left with no alternative but to take a deep breath &; spend $$$ in order to create something that was not at war with the rest of the house . Curses ! Foiled again ( and again , and again ... ) !
domestication: 每次搬家（别问了），我们总是买些不同年代的老房子，结果呢，厨房和浴室没有一次是完好的，全得拆了重来。更糟的是，之前的房主们通常会把原装的设施拆掉，换成便宜货，弄得房子里到处都是类似的“悲剧”。雪上加霜的是，这些活儿多半是所谓的“万能工”干的，弄得我们只能深吸一口气，咬牙花钱，费力不讨好地去恢复房子原本的风貌。真是气人！又是这样（一次又一次……）！

source: I pledge to save the pink bathrooms ! ! We bought our mid-century ranch about two years ago . It was a bit of a fixer upper , so we have been giving it a much needed face lift while still preserving a lot of the original character and charm . With plans of completely gutting and remodeling the original pink bathroom , I 've convinced my husband that I can make the pink work . Once I am done restoring and preserving our pink bathroom , I truly believe it will be saved as long as the house is still standing . Pink bathrooms live on !
domestication: 我发誓要拯救这间粉红色的浴室！我们是在大约两年前买下了这栋中世纪风格的牧场式房子。当时这房子需要一番修整，所以我们一直在给它做必要的翻新，同时尽量保留它的原始韵味和魅力。原本计划是要彻底翻新原来的粉红浴室，但后来我说服了老公，相信我能把这个粉红色调利用好。等我把这个粉红浴室恢复并保存好后，我相信只要房子还在，这间浴室就会一直存在下去。粉红浴室万岁！

source: Such lopsided comparisons are n't unusual at U.S. corporations . To justify how much they offer CEOs , board compensation committees typically measure against the pay of CEOs at other companies . But they routinely pick larger companies , often outside their industry , that pay more and are n't rivals for the same executive talent . " There is pretty straightforward evidence of cherry-picking , and it 's pervasive , " says Thomas DiPrete , a Columbia University sociologist who has studied the use of board-selected peers to set CEO pay .

source: As of February 7 , 2011 , the final well reports indicated that the Illinois Well had been drilled to a total depth of 3,500 feet . Around July 14 , 2011 , the Operator injected water into the water injection well in order for the water to push the oil over to the Illinois Well to increase production . In the event this does not increase production , the operator may decide to treat the wells with chemicals if there is paraffin , or a waxy buildup , caking the perforations of the well bore , but the operator has no immediate plans to do this as he would like to continually re-evaluate how much oil is being produced from the Illinois Well .
domestication: 截至2011年2月7日，最终的井报告表明，伊利诺斯井已经钻到了3500英尺的总深度。大约在2011年7月14日左右，操作员向注水井注入了水，希望用水把油推到伊利诺斯井，提高产量。如果这样还不见效，操作员可能会考虑用化学药剂处理井，前提是井筒的射孔部位有石蜡或者蜡状物堆积的情况，不过目前他还没打算这么做，他想继续评估伊利诺斯井的产油量。
foreignization: 截至2011年2月7日，最终的井报告表明，伊利诺伊井已钻至总深度3,500英尺。大约在2011年7月14日，运营商向注水井注入了水，以便让水将油推向伊利诺伊井以增加产量。如果这不能增加产量，运营商可能会决定用化学物质处理井，如果有石蜡或蜡状沉积物堵塞了井筒的射孔，但运营商目前没有立即这样做计划，因为他希望持续重新评估从伊利诺伊井生产的油量。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As of February 7 , 2011 , the final well reports indicated that the Illinois Well had been drilled to a total depth of 3,500 feet . Around July 14 , 2011 , the Operator injected water into the water injection well in order for the water to push the oil over to the Illinois Well to increase production . In the event this does not increase production , the operator may decide to treat the wells with chemicals if there is paraffin , or a waxy buildup , caking the perforations of the well bore , but the operator has no immediate plans to do this as he would like to continually re-evaluate how much oil is being produced from the Illinois Well .

source: Talks were then held between Iran and the five permanent members of the United Nations Security Council -- the United States , Russia , China , Britain and France -- as well as Germany , and led by the European Union ' s foreign policy chief , Javier Solana . At the talks , Iran agreed in principle to export most of its enriched uranium for processing , a step that would have bought more time for negotiations by reducing the amount of potential bomb-making material in Iran 's hands for up to a year .

CONCLUSIONS :

source: A few statistics convey the magnitude of the CIA 's propaganda campaign mounted during the six-week interim period in the Latin American and European media . According to the CIA , partial returns showed that 726 articles , broadcasts , editorials , and similar items directlv resulted from Agency activity . source: It is a good thing , and I have enjoyed watching it evolve over the years . Whoever guided this evolution was applying Evolution by Cogitation , not Evolution by Natural Selection . Evolution by Cogitation has several defining characteristics , and among the most important are four eternal questions that any efficient process must answer : Where do we stand ? How did we get here ? Where do we want to go ? How do we get there from here ? Life at Daily Kos , from my standpoint as a systems designer , has been engrossing as these questions have been , and are being , answered .
domestication: 这可真是件好事，这些年看着它一步步发展过来，真是挺享受的。推动这一切变化的人，靠的是深思熟虑的进化，而不是自然选择。这种深思熟虑的进化有几个显著的特点，其中最重要的就是四个必须回答的问题：我们现在处于什么位置？我们是怎么走到这一步的？我们想要去哪里？从这里到那里，我们应该怎么走？从我这个系统设计师的角度来看，Daily Kos的生活就像解答这些问题一样引人入胜，而且这些问题现在还在继续被解答。
foreignization: 这是一件好事，我享受着多年来观察它的演变。无论谁引导了这一演变过程，都是通过“思考的进化”而非“自然选择的进化”来实现的。“思考的进化”有几个定义特征，其中最重要的是四个任何高效流程都必须回答的永恒问题：我们目前处于什么位置？我们是如何到达这里的？我们想要去哪里？从这里到那里我们该怎么做？从我作为系统设计师的角度来看，Daily Kos的生活随着这些问题被回答而变得引人入胜。
